caption: A man with glasses, a grey stylized wig, and headphones is speaking into a microphone in a room filled with framed pictures on the walls. He wears a white dress shirt with a small red bow tie and tan suspenders. In front of him is a black professional microphone, and a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the left side of the scene. Another logo stating "BOSS TALK 101" is visible on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man is talking, shifting his facial expression and moving his right hand in small gestures to emphasize his points. He remains seated in the same position throughout the clip, while the background remains static, consisting of numerous small photo frames and some clothing items hanging on a rack.
